from flask import Flask, request

app = Flask(__name__)


@app.route("/transfer", methods=["POST"])
def transfer_funds():
    data = request.json
    sender_id = data["sender_id"]
    recipient_id = data["recipient_id"]
    amount = data["amount"]

    assert amount > 0, "Amount must be positive"
    assert sender_id != recipient_id, "Cannot transfer to self"
    assert len(data.get("reference", "")) <= 50, "Reference too long"

    sender = get_account(sender_id)
    assert sender.balance >= amount, "Insufficient funds"

    execute_transfer(sender_id, recipient_id, amount)
    return {"status": "completed"}


@app.route("/user", methods=["POST"])
def create_user():
    data = request.json
    assert "email" in data, "Email is required"
    assert "@" in data["email"], "Invalid email"
    assert len(data["password"]) >= 8, "Password too short"
    assert data["age"] >= 18, "Must be 18 or older"

    user = save_user(data)
    return {"id": user.id}
